markets.no_sub_title: Jon Rahm beats Bryson DeChambeau
markets.rules_primary: If Jon Rahm wins the head-to-head matchup against Bryson DeChambeau in the full tournament of the 2026 The Masters, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
If the head-to-head matchup is for a singular round, only the golfers’ scores from that specific round will be considered for the resolution of the market, regardless of their cumulative tournament score at the end of that round.

markets.no_sub_title: What a Fight
markets.rules_primary: If the play by play or color commentator(s) says What a Fight as part of Chiesa vs Price professional MMA fight originally scheduled for Mar 28, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Video of the Chiesa vs Price professional MMA fight originally scheduled for Mar 28, 2026 will be primarily used to resolve the market; if a consensus by Kalshi employees cannot be reached using video, internal & external (official) transcripts of the Chiesa vs Price professional MMA fight originally scheduled for Mar 28, 2026 will be used.

Payout Criterion: 
The exact phrase/word, or a plural or possessive form of the phrase/word, must be used. Grammatical/tense inflections are otherwise not included.
